description: You are the crop protection manager at GAEC JOULIN. Log in to Ekylibre at http://demo.ekylibre.farm:3000 using admin@ekylibre.org / 12345678. A Fusarium head blight (fusariose des épis) alert was issued for Charente-Maritime wheat fields on 2023-06-15. Record a separate phytosanitary spray intervention for every Blé tendre d'hiver (soft winter wheat) parcel in the current campaign for that date, specifying the treatment product, application equipment, and farm worker for each record.
